Author: goat, maintained by Franze, edited by ShiftyKiwi
Name: KiwiRichPresence
Punchline: Customizable Discord Rich Presence for FFXIV
Description: Forked and expanded Discord Rich Presence for FFXIV with templates, job/context presets, custom images, privacy controls, and live preview tools.
Changelog: Adds zone presets for territory-specific Rich Presence customization, including searchable zone targeting, preset precedence guidance in /prp, and support for location-specific large/small image, text, privacy, and party overrides.
